title: Clean Smithing Templates
description: If you don't like Mojang's trim template textures, you might wanna check out this pack! :)
body:
**Introduction**\
When Armor Trims were first announced, I wasn't happy with the concept at all and had a huge dislike for the item textures. By now I really like them but I figured I'd share this pack I've created back then anyways.

**Modified features**
- Replaced all Armor Trim Smithing Template textures
- Adjusted the respective UI textures

![All modified items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68b1ab912a1823d9e8e3b6fb5160f3239f6fa8b0.png)

**Issues and feedback**\
If you encounter any problems with the pack or would like to leave any other feedback, feel free to contact me on Discord: @miau_the_cat
